_**Agent (copilot/auto)**_

Got it. For OAuth authentication with Make.com MCP, update your `mcp.json` to include OAuth2 config:

```json
{
	"servers": {
		"make-mcp": {
			"url": "https://mcp.make.com",
			"type": "http",
			"auth": {
				"type": "oauth2",
				"clientId": "YOUR_CLIENT_ID",
				"clientSecret": "YOUR_CLIENT_SECRET",
				"authorizationUrl": "https://make.com/oauth/authorize",
				"tokenUrl": "https://make.com/oauth/token"
			}
		}
	},
	"inputs": []
}
```

**You'll need:**
1. **Client ID** and **Client Secret** from Make.com's OAuth app settings
2. Visit [Make.com API settings](https://make.com/en/integrations) or your account's app credentials section to create/retrieve your OAuth credentials

Do you have your Client ID and Client Secret from Make.com? Once you provide them, I can update the config file for you.
